extraction.one_line_summary: VALVERDE won stage 6 uphill sprint finish at La Cipet, out-accelerating GEOGHEGAN HART in final 100m while LUTSENKO took yellow via third place time bonus.
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO positioned himself third wheel in final 200m specifically to capture time bonus for yellow, not stage win.
Movistar deployed LÓPEZ as lead-out man for final 2km, unusual team sacrifice allowing VALVERDE fresh legs for sprint.
CRADDOCK bridged solo from peloton to breakaway mid-stage, revealing EF tactical willingness to sacrifice GC for stage hunting.
GEOGHEGAN HART launched first move with 200m remaining but insufficient gap before VALVERDE's superior sprint closed him down.
Jumbo-Visma and Astana both placed multiple riders in final group but neither team controlled finale, allowing Movistar's patience.

rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: at 41 demonstrated superior sprint acceleration from fifth wheel position, closing GEOGHEGAN HART's 100m gap
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: tactically precise positioning for time bonus over stage win, managed effort across multiple late climbs
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: neutral: strong enough to initiate winning move but lacked acceleration to hold off veteran sprinter
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: sacrificed personal result by riding tempo final 2km, demonstrating team cohesion under pressure
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: moved to third overall despite PÖSTLBERGER fadeout creating chaotic finale
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: remained in contact but passive in finale, finishing fourth overall without contesting sprint
rider_signals.CRADDOCK Lawson: positive: bridged 114-second gap solo mid-race to service breakaway, revealing strong climbing form
rider_signals.PÖSTLBERGER Lukas: negative: faded badly on final climbs after defending yellow since stage 2, suggesting unsustainable early effort
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: late attack earned top-10 but insufficient to challenge sprint finishers or gain significant time
